headline: $20+ Bn Connected Worker Global Market Forecasts 2025-2030 with Zebra Technologies, Honeywell International, Microsoft, and Hexagon Dominating
summary: The global connected worker market is projected to grow from USD 8.62 billion in 2025 to USD 20.18 billion by 2030, with an impressive CAGR of 18.5%. This growth is driven by the increasing adoption of remote and hybrid work models, which utilize advanced digital tools for seamless communication across distributed teams. The Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) dominated the 2024 market, enhancing operational efficiency and safety, especially in manufacturing and construction. The software segme
